title: Electromagnetic Navigation for Femoral Osteotomy Using High-Accuracy X-ray-to-CT Registration
summary: Accurate execution of preoperative plans in corrective femoral osteotomies remains challenging.

title: NeuralBoneReg: A Novel Self-Supervised Method for Robust and Accurate Multi-Modal Bone Surface Registration
summary: In computer- and robot-assisted orthopedic surgery (CAOS), patient-specific surgical plans derived from preoperative imaging define target locations and implant trajectories.

title: Bone Substructure Contours for 2D/3D Registration
summary: Purpose: Accurate intraoperative X-ray/CT registration is essential for surgical navigation in orthopedic procedures.

title: Real-World Mobile Image Denoising Dataset with Efficient Baselines
summary: A curated dataset that captures the complexity of mobile noise patterns alongside strong baseline models optimized for on-device deployment. The work sets a new foundation for realistic benchmarking and rapid experimentation in mobile imaging pipelines.
